3245270.name: In Essence: Nil - (MaidxMan) / chapel
3245270.description:
This is a game about a priestess rescuing a city from malicious factions of people that have taken advantage of it's defenseless state. This is done by purifying enough shrines around the world and killing the faction leaders. The protagonist is Quinine V the Banished Priestess.

FPS combat with light RPG mechanics

Wide hit-box projectiles that scale steeply with level makes it a relatively easy experience all around, accuracy is not a requirement.

Extremely easy 3D platforming with flying mechanics

The magical plane suspends matter in the air meaning you have to jump and fly to navigate the zone.

A variety of enemies and bosses

An un-dead army and a population blighted with magical essence threaten the player constantly.

Custom Engine

The engine and all assets are made by one developer!
3245270.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
